name: seo-dungeon
description: SEO Dungeon skill suite for Codex: gamified SEO audits backed by the bundled SEO engine.

interface.shortDescription: Run SEO Dungeon audits and SEO workflows in Codex.
interface.longDescription: SEO Dungeon is a gamified SEO analysis suite with Codex-compatible skills, Codex agent profiles, shared cache artifacts, optional API integrations, and a dungeon crawler UI.
defaultPrompt: Audit this website for SEO issues.
Check schema and Core Web Vitals for this URL.
Build an SEO action plan for this business.
